nodes.itemHTML: • vue-stripe-elementsstars506 - Vue component collection for Stripe.js
• namiml.com - Complete platform for in-app purchases and subscriptions on iOS and Android, including no-code paywalls, CRM, and analytics. Free for all base features to run an IAP business.
• Databunker - Databunker is a network-based, self-hosted, GDPR compliant, secure storage for personal data.
• Mergify — workflow automation and merge queue for GitHub — Free for public GitHub repositories
• FreakCstars40 - Full-blown programming language with NSFW contents and memes.
• JellyScriptstars6 - Brainfuck-based with delicious jelly.
• NodeHost [FREE] - PHP hosting. 500MB Storage, 80GB Bandwidth, 1 Database, and 2 email accounts per site, 28 day backup history.

• LogDNA[FREE] - Log management platform that offers aggregation, monitoring, and analysis of server and application logs at any volume, from any source.Up to 50 GB/month of log storage with 14 day retention for one year via Github Student Developer Pack.
• Volarstars839 - The Fastest Vue Language Support Extension

• Azure for Students [FREE / DISCOUNT] - Subscriptions provide access to Azure services. Azure for Students gives you $100 credit for 12 months. It includes access to more than 25 free services, including compute, network, storage, and databases. Any charges incurred during this period are deducted from the credit.
• Clicky — Website Analytics Platform. Free Plan for 1 website with 3000 views analytics.
• Blynk — A SaaS with API to control, build & evaluate IoT devices. Free Developer Plan with 5 devices,Free Cloud & data storage. Mobile Apps also available.
• Code Combat - Code a hero to compete heroic tasks using Javascript or Python. The hero gets new weapons or skills whenever the user learns a new method.
• Hopscotch - Hopscotch is a code block editor like Scratch, but in an iOS app. Can program code to react to tipping and shaking the device.

• Evo from Ozobot - Evo is a tiny robot that can move, light up, and make sounds. Also it detects what color it is driving on. It can follow commands based on the color of the line it is following. Or, it can be programmed using a code block editor like Scratch. Hold the robot up to a flashing dot on the screen, and the website will load the program onto the robot with light flashes.
• tinkercad.com - TinkerCAD is a free, 3D CAD modeling software program for children. Users can also manipulate the shapes using code blocks like Scratch.
• Snipcart - Include a few lines of code for a full online shop.
• GlobaLeaks - Free, open source software enabling anyone to easily set up and maintain a secure whistleblowing platform.
• SecureDrop - Open source whistleblower submission system that media organizations and NGOs can install to securely accept documents from anonymous sources.
• Steve Sanderson at the NDC Manchester 2021 - March 25, 2021 - Blazor in 2021: .NET 5, .NET 6 and beyond.

• StackBy — One tool that brings together flexibility of spreadsheets, power of databases and built-in integrations with your favorite business apps. Free plan includes unlimited users, 10 stacks, 2GB attachment per stack.

• Qubes OS - Desktop environment built atop the Xen hypervisor project that runs each end-user program in its own virtual machine intended to provide strict security controls to constrain the reach of any successful malware exploit.
• MediaCMS - MediaCMS is a modern, fully featured open source video and media CMS, written in Python/Django/React, featuring a REST API. (Source Codestars369) AGPL-3.0 Python/Docker
• docker-go-mingwstars15 - Docker image for building Go binaries for Windows with MinGW toolchain.
• Tinido – A beautiful and simple task management app that can also give you insights by showing your completed tasks in a contribution graph similar to the one you find on your GitHub profile.
• Golang Kathmandu
• Practical Go Lessons
• gostradamusstars153 - A Go package for working with dates.
• bloomfilterstars2 - Yet another Bloomfilter implementation in Go, compatible with Java's Guava library.
• ankostars14 - Simple application watcher for multiple programming languages.
• box-cli-makerstars133 - Make Highly Customized Boxes for your CLI.
• Debugged.it Go patternsstars6 - Advanced Go patterns with ready-to-run examples.
• insidieux/iniziostars8 - Golang project layout generator with plugins.
• Confetti Framework - Confetti is a Go web application framework with an expressive, elegant syntax. Confetti combines the elegance of Laravel and the simplicity of Go.
• rust-nix-templaterstars16 - Generates Nix build and development files for Rust projects.
• kube-forensicsstars111 - Allows a cluster administrator to dump the current state of a running pod and all its containers so that security professionals can perform off-line forensic analysis.
• NixCon - The annual community conference for contributors and users of Nix and NixOS.
• Runbookstars542 - A framework and Ruby DSL for progressive system automation.
• Mittsustars409 - Mittsu makes 3D graphics easier by providing an abstraction over OpenGL, and is based heavily off of THREE.js.
• Trick Bagstars32 - Assorted Ruby classes and methods to simplify and enhance your code.
• TensorFlowstars266 - The end-to-end machine learning platform for Ruby.
• Torch.rbstars347 - Deep learning for Ruby, powered by LibTorch.
• Reforms.jsstars5 - Vue 3 and Bootstrap forms and cards generator. Validation, multiple fields, grouping, schema and more.
• k6-reporterstars22 - Tool for converting k6 output to HTML reports.
• juststars2.8k - Modern make-like command runner.
• ExBinstars3 - A pastebin with public/private snippets and netcat server. (Demo) MIT Elixir

• Bird Eats Bug — Report bugs faster (and better). Record your screen with Bird browser extension, it will auto-capture technical data that engineers need to debug. Free tier suitable for small teams.
• Blazor WebAssembly : Creating Chat Application Using SignalR - March 25, 2021 - Blazor WebAssembly : Creating Chat Application Using SignalR.
• 🍓 ADmad/JwtAuth pluginstars157 - A plugin for authenticating using JSON Web Tokens.
• 🍓 Robotusers/TableInheritance pluginstars5 - Singe Table Inheritance (STI) plugin.
• 🍓 Cake/ElasticSearch pluginstars86 - Alternative ORM using Elasticsearch as its backend.
• 🍓 Recaptcha pluginstars18 - Simple, lightweight Google Recaptcha v2.
• 🍓 TwigView pluginstars11 - A plugin to use the Twig Templating Language for views.
• ShareX – Screen capture, file sharing and productivity tool.
• Zube — Project management with free plan for 4 Projects & 4 users. GitHub integration available.
• Code::Blocks — Free Fortran & C/C++ IDE. Open Source and runs on Windows,macOS & Linux.
• Elementor — WordPress website builder. Free plan available with 40+ Basic Widgets.
• Quantum Computing for the Quantum Curious - Freely available quantum computing textbook aimed at high school students, undergraduate students and the general public.
• IridescentViewstars8 - A custom Xamarin.Android ImageView with iridescence effect.
• SimpleLocalize ★19stars21 - Open source tool for managing i18n keys in Xmarin projects.
• Apizr ★4stars11 - Refit based web api client, but resilient (retry, connectivity, cache, auth, log, priority, etc...).

• Planet Xamarin - An aggregator of content from Xamarin Community members. Why subscribe individually when you can subscribe to one convenient RSS feed? If RSS isn't your thing, follow the Twitter or Facebook accounts which are automatically updated with the latest content from the community.
• Xamarin Online Courses - A list of over 60 Online Courses (free and paid) from Classpert Online Course Search.
• Unistorestars2.8k - 350b / 650b state container with component actions for Preact & React.
• ONYX - Modern lighting control system with alot of features.
• Realtime deployment Tutorial on Python time-series model deployment.
• Microprediction
• Using Next.js with FaunaDB: How to Query the Database from Your App
• fzf-preztostars1 - Prezto plugin that finds where fzfstars36.6k has been installed and enables its auto-completion and key-bindings.
• robostars2 - A ZSH plugin for Robo.
• React-Native-Substrate-Signstars14 -
• notify (luismayta)stars5 - Notifications for ZSH with auto installation of dependencies and r2d2 sounds.

• notify (marzocchi)stars399 - A plugin for ZSH (on macOS and Linux) that posts desktop notifications when a command terminates with a non-zero exit status or when it took more than 30 seconds to complete, if the terminal application is in the background (or the command's terminal tab is inactive).
• pyechartsstars10.9k - Migrated from Echartsstars46.3k, a charting and visualization library, to Python's interactive visual drawing library.
• Shinestars136 [135⭐] - Pretty shadows with dynamic light positions by Jonathan Monga.
• GenLangstars84 [84⭐] - Code generator for Internationalization by King Wu.
• Flutter Translatestars250 [246⭐] - Internationalization (i18n) library by Florin Bratan.
• 2048stars178 [178⭐] - 2048 game by Anuran Barman.
• Party Charadesstars154 [153⭐] - Party charades by Kamil Rykowski.
• Superhero Interactionstars217 [216⭐] - Cool Superhero interaction animation by Pinkesh Darji.
• Environment Configurationstars75 [66⭐] - CLI tool to generate .env configurations for application environments by TatsuUkraine.
• kics - Find security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations in your infrastructure-as-code. Supports Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CloudFormation and Ansible
• jupyterlab-executorstars5 - Extension to execute scripts from the Jupyterlab file browser.
• 2021: Vision: NLG Can Help Humanise Data and AI
• Foxglove Studiostars141 - Integrated visualization and diagnosis tool for robotics (support for ROS 2 coming soon).

• AWS Previews Deployment Tool for .NET Web Apps, Blazor WebAssembly - March 19, 2021 - Amazon Web Services (AWS) announced a developer preview to ease the process of deploying .NET web apps on the cloud platform, which has become more complex with the advent of tech like Docker and serverless joining the ever-growing .NET ecosystem.
• React, writing a book, and Blazor with Carl Rippon - March 22, 2021 - Coding after work, episode 57: React, writing a book, and Blazor with Carl Rippon. Duration: 35 minutes.

• Setting dynamic metadata for Blazor Web Assembly - March 23, 2021 - This post shows how HTML header meta data can be dynamically updated or changed for a Blazor Web assembly application routes hosted in ASP.NET Core. This can be usually for changing how URL link previews are displayed when sharing links. Source codestars3 .
• Testing Blazor Apps & Components - March 26, 2021 - Blazor Train, episode 43: Testing Blazor Apps & Components.

• Introduction to Dynamic Components in Blazor - March 22, 2021 - This video shows how you can use one of the most interesting features in Blazor w/ .NET 6.0 preview which is Dynamic Components. Dynamic Components can help you load content from multiple components dynamically in Blazor without too much hassle. Source codestars1 .
• Excluding Files from PWA Asset Cache - March 24, 2021 - This article shows how to exclude a files from the Progressive Web Application asset cache.
• Deep Learning - An Introductory course to the world of Deep Learning using TensorFlow.
• How Machine Learning Works - Mostafa Samir. Early access book that introduces machine learning from both practical and theoretical aspects in a non-threating way.
• AI Algorithms, Data Structures and Idioms in Prolog, Lisp and Java - PDF here
• Artificial Intelligence and Molecular Biology - The current volume is an effort to bridge that range of exploration, from nucleotide to abstract concept, in contemporary AI/MB research.
• Encyclopedia: Computational intelligence - Scholarpedia is a peer-reviewed open-access encyclopedia written and maintained by scholarly experts from around the world.

• Deep Learning - Yoshua Bengio, Ian Goodfellow and Aaron Courville put together this currently free (and draft version) book on deep learning. The book is kept up-to-date and covers a wide range of topics in depth (up to and including sequence-to-sequence learning).
• Deep Learning.net - Aggregation site for DL resources
• Applied Artificial Intelligence
• Electronic Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
• International Journal of Intelligent Systems
• International Journal on Artificial Intelligence Tools
• Journal of Experimental and Theoretical Artificial Intelligence
• CS50’s Intro to Artificial Intelligence - This course explores the concepts and algorithms at the foundation of modern artificial intelligence
• percy.io - Add visual testing to any web app, static site, style guide, or component library. Unlimited team members, Demo app and unlimited projects, 5,000 snapshots / month.

• Zoho — Started as an e-mail provider but now provides a suite of services out of which some of them have free plans. List of services having free plans :
    • Email Free for 5 users. 5GB/user & 25 MB attachment limit, 1 domain.
    • Sprints Free for 5 users,5 Projects & 500MB storage.
    • Docs — Free for 5 users with 1 GB upload limit & 5GB storage. Zoho Office Suite (Writer,Sheets & Show) comes bundled with it.
    • Projects — Free for 3 users, 2 projects & 10 MB attachment limit. Same plan applies to Bugtracker.
    • Connect — Team Collaboration free for 25 users with 3 groups, 3 custom apps, 3 Boards, 3 Manuals, 10 Integrations along with channels,events & forums.
    • Meeting — Meetings with upto 3 meeting participants & 10 Webinar attendees.
    • Vault — Password Management free for Individuals.
    • Showtime — Yet another Meeting software for training for a remote session upto 5 attendees.
    • Notebook — A free alternative to Evernote.
    • Wiki — Free for 3 users with 50 MB storage, unlimited pages, zip backups, RSS & Atom feed, access controls & customisable CSS.
    • Subscriptions — Recurring Billing management free for 20 customers/subscriptions & 1 user with all the payment hosting done by Zoho themselves. Last 40 subscription metrics are stored
    • Checkout — Product Billing management with 3 pages & up to 50 payments.
    • Desk — Customer Support management with 3 agents and private knowledge base, email tickets. Integrates with Assist for 1 remote technician & 5 unattended computers.
    • Cliq — Team chat software with 100 GB storage, unlimited users, 100 users per channel & SSO.
    • Campaigns
    • Forms
    • Sign
    • Surveys
    • Bookings
    • Analytics

• Hound - Handily search across all or selected Nix-related repositories.
• NixOS Weekly - The newsletter to stay informed about community updates.

• Nix Infra Status - Get the age and current git commit of each Nix channel.

• gitignore.nixstars103 - The most feature-complete and easy-to-use .gitignore integration.
• lorristars947 - A much better nix-shell for development that augments direnv.
• nivstars707 - Easy dependency management for Nix projects with package pinning.
• node2nixstars273 - Generate Nix expressions from a package.lock npm file.
• nixcloud-webservicesstars101 - A Nixpkgs extension with a focus on ease of deployment of web-related technologies.
• Simple Nixos Mailserver - A complete mailserver, managed with NixOS modules.
• nix-bitcoinstars160 - Nix packages and NixOS modules for Bitcoin nodes with higher-layer protocols with an emphasis on security.
• nixpkgs-mozillastars300 - Mozilla's overlay with bleeding-edge Rust and Firefox.
• nixpkgs-waylandstars183 - Bleeding-edge Wayland packages.
• NURstars493 - Nix User Repositories. The mother of all overlays, allowing access to user repositories and installing packages via attributes.
• Discourse - The best place to get help and discuss Nix-related topics.
• Icons8 — Icons, illustrations, photos, music, and design tools. Free Plan offers Limited formats in lower resolution. Link to Icons8 when you use our assets.

• Rive — Create and ship beautiful animations to any platform. Free forever for Individuals. The service is a editor which hosts all the graphics on their servers as well. They also provide runtimes for many platforms to run graphics made using Rive.
• GTK Documentation - Official GTK documentation.
• GJS Guide - Guide for GJS.
• KuberNixstars559 - Single-dependency Kubernetes clusters via Nix packages.
• poetry2nixstars147 - Build Python packages directly from Poetry's poetry.lock. No conversion step needed.
• naerskstars210 - Build Rust packages directly from Cargo.lock. No conversion step needed.

• gentoostars1 - Adds some aliases and functions to work with Gentoo Linux.
• Backpropstars176 - Backprop makes it simple to use, finetune, and deploy state-of-the-art ML models.

nodes.itemHTML: • Lemmy - A link aggregator / reddit clone for the fediverse. Reddit alternative built in Rust. (Source Codestars5k) AGPL-3.0 Rust
• CodeBeat — Automated Code Review Platform available for many languages. Free forever for public repositories with Slack & E-mail integration.
• Decision List - Like a decision tree with no branches.
• Decision Trees - The tree provides an interpretation.
• Explainable Boosting Machine - Method that predicts based on learned vector graphs of features.
• k-Nearest Neighbors - The prototypical clustering method.
• Linear Regression - Easily plottable and understandable regression.
• Logistic Regression - Easily plottable and understandable classification.
• Naive Bayes - Good classification, poor estimation using conditional probabilities.
• RuleFit - Sparse linear model as decision rules including feature interactions.
• Debate: Interpretability is necessary for ML - A debate on whether interpretability is necessary for ML with Rich Caruana and Patrice Simard for and Kilian Weinberger and Yann LeCun against.
• chartstars38 - Console ASCII line charts with no dependencies.
• mini_i18nstars91 - Minimalistic, flexible and fast Internationalization library. It supports localization, interpolations, pluralization, fallbacks, nested keys and more.
• FastAPI Code Generatorstars197 - Create a FastAPI app from an OpenAPI file, enabling schema-driven development.
• Modern APIs with FastAPI and Python - A course designed to get you creating new APIs running in the cloud with FastAPI quickly.

• CalcuPi - A beautiful Monte Carlo simulation for approximating the value of pi.
• Air Hockey Classic - Android, iOS - Play the classic 'Air Hockey' arcade game now on your mobile device! By Ignace Maes
• Pool Ball Classic - Android, iOS - Play 8 Ball Pool like you know and love on your mobile device featuring 3D graphics, realistic physics, and a challenging AI mode. By Ignace Maes
• Kuiperstars358 - An edge lightweight IoT data analytics/streaming software implemented by Golang, and it can be run at all kinds of resource-constrained edge devices.
• Citizen Science Data Show Temperature-Driven Declines in Riverine Sentinel Invertebrates Timothy J. Maguire, Scott O. C. Mundle. (2020)
• Kritika — Static Code Analysis for Perl with integration for GitHub. Free for unlimited public repositories.

• Vaadin — Build scalable UIs in Java or TypeScript, and use the integrated tooling, components and design system to iterate faster, design better and simplify the development process. Unlimited Projects with 5 years free maintenance.
• ghost-digitaloceanstars19 - A DigitalOcean Storage adapter for Ghost.

• Dede - An independent and universal passenger information system (PIS) mapping realtime movement. A message feed with Vehicle Position entities in the GTFS-Realtime format or the Dede appstars1 can be used as data source.
• Dede Appstars1 - An app making any Android powered phone become an Automatic Vehicle Locating (AVL) device for the Dede passenger information system (PIS).
• gtfs-via-postgresstars11 – Yet another tool to process GTFS using PostgreSQL.

• Transport Operator Mobility-as-a-service Provider (TOMP)-APIstars47 - Working group in the Netherlands with a goal to develop an API for use by Transport Operators and Mobility-as-a-service Providers for operator discovery, trip planning, end user interaction, booking, and payment.

• Pinata IPFS — Pinata is the simplest way to upload and manage files on IPFS. Our friendly user interface combined with our IPFS API makes Pinata the easiest IPFS pinning service for platforms, creators, and collectors. 1 GB storage free along with access to API.

• Docto Tech Life. A weekly newsletter featuring the latest Rails + Javascript + software engineering content.
